title: Kreemine pastakaste
titleEn: Creamy Vegan Mac and Cheese Sauce
instructions: Cut potatoes and carrots into approximately 2cm pieces and bring to a boil. Simmer covered on low heat for about 15 minutes until tender.
Drain water completely and transfer cooked vegetables to a blender.
Add all remaining ingredients and blend until smooth and creamy.
Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
Use hot as a pasta sauce, lasagna topping, or casserole cover. When cooled, works well as a dip.
notes: Keeps in the refrigerator for 4–5 days. Use only neutral-flavored oil. Starchy potatoes yield best results.
description: Kreemine kaste sobib ideaalselt pastale aga tegelikult kuhu iganes. Jahtunult naudi seda tipina koos tortilla krõpsudega.
descriptionEn: This creamy sauce pairs perfectly with pasta but works wonderfully anywhere. When chilled, enjoy it as a dip alongside tortilla chips.

title: Magushapu tomatikaste
instructions: Finely mince the onion, garlic, ginger, and chili into a near-paste consistency.
Lightly sauté the mixture in sesame oil over low heat; add water if needed.
Add sugar to the pan and allow it to caramelize slightly.
Stir in tomato paste and rice vinegar, along with salt.
Mix cornstarch with cold water, then pour into the pan while stirring. Allow to thicken.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt, sugar, vinegar, or chili powder.
notes: Balance all four flavors: sweet, salty, sour, and spicy. The sauce stores well in the refrigerator.
description: Selle kastme kasutusviisid on lõputud. Sobib nii nuudlitele kui riisile, kotlettidele, nagitsatele jne.
descriptionEn: This sauce has endless uses. Works with noodles, rice, cutlets, fritters, and so much more.

title: Avokaado-jogurti salatikaste
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
Adjust sauce consistency with soy milk as needed.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
notes: Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Avocado oxidizes when exposed to oxygen so the sauce may develop a grayish tone but remains edible for a couple of days. Pairs well with salads, omelettes, tortilla fillings, or as a dip.
description: Mõnusalt värske ja kreemine kaste sobib enamuse salatite kõrvale aga ka näiteks omleti juurde.
descriptionEn: A pleasantly fresh and creamy sauce that works alongside most salads, omelets, tortilla fillings, or as a veggie dip.

title: Tervise-tahiini
instructions: Lightly roast sunflower seeds in a dry pan, then add sesame seeds.
Toast continuously, stirring constantly, until sesame seeds turn light golden — avoid browning.
Allow seeds to cool completely.
Transfer cooled seeds to a tall, narrow bowl suitable for food processing.
Add all oils and salt.
Use a food processor to blend mixture into a uniform paste, working at moderate speed to prevent overheating.
Add additional oil if needed for consistency.
notes: A food processor works better than a blender. Adapt oils based on availability — the result maintains omega-3 fatty acids, selenium, iron, zinc, potassium, and calcium.
description: Klassikaline tahiini koosneb seesamiseemnetest ja õlist. See tahiini on märksa võimsam! Siia on lisaks seesamiseemnetele peidetud veel päevalille- ja linaseemned ning mitmed tervislikud õlid.
descriptionEn: Classic tahini is made from sesame seeds and oil. This version is considerably more potent — packed with sunflower and flax seeds plus several healthful oils.
